title: About
text: I love music and sports. My favorite game is NBA 2026.

title: TREVOR Ho
text:
About me
I am currently a junior at the Flower Mound High School. I am on Track and Field team running hurdles and mid-range. I love sports and play basketball and volleyball.

title: Sports
text: My passion is track and field. I have been running track for two years now . I run hurdles and mid-range. I also play basketball and volleyball. I love sports and being active. I also enjoy watching sports and playing video games.
